title: SealedCausalChain
description: Immutable causal chain record linking a derived object back to its root declaration. All fields are set once at creation time and are never modified thereafter. The admission webhook rejects any write that alters a SealedCausalChain field after creation.

originKind.description: Kind of the root declaration that is the causal origin of this derived object (e.g., TalosCluster, PackExecution).

originName.description: Name of the root declaration that is the causal origin of this derived object.

originNamespace.description: Namespace of the root declaration that is the causal origin of this derived object.

creationRationale.description: Controlled vocabulary value drawn from the Seam Core CreationRationale enumeration (pkg/lineage). Describes the reason this derived object was created.

sealedAt.description: Timestamp at which this causal chain record was sealed. Set once at creation and never updated.

sealedBy.description: Identity (service account or controller name) that sealed this causal chain record. Matches the controller's Kubernetes service account principal.
